Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation

Class TextualJMLSpecCase

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation.TextualJMLConstruct
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation.TextualJMLSpecCase
public final class TextualJMLSpecCase extends TextualJMLConstruct
A JML specification case (i.e., more or less an operation contract) in textual form. Is also used for block contracts.
